creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
Fails to mount vbox share:
mount -t vboxsf ShareName MountPoint

mount: ShareName: Operation not supported by device

When FreeBSD is guest, vbox additions are installed, vbox host share is set, try to mount it in FreeBSD guest.

How-To-Repeat: mount -t vboxsf ShareName MountPoint
